---
title: "Resources"
description: "Categorized research materials, conference summaries, and technical learning resources."
include-in-header: 
  text: |
    <script src="../assets/js/system-init.js"></script>
---

# Research Resources

Explore curated content spanning modern geospatial technologies, conference workshops, and essential learning materials.

## 🎤 Conferences & Workshops
Summaries and technical insights from international research gatherings.

::: {.innovation-section}
::: {.innovation-grid}

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="../images/resource2.jpg" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[ML for Remote Sensing (ICLR 2023)](ml-remote-sensing.qmd){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Detailed breakdown of the Machine Learning for Remote Sensing workshop at ICLR 2023.
:::
:::

:::
:::

<br>

## 📖 Research Guides & Notes
Technical transitions and deep-dives into geospatial methodologies.

::: {.innovation-section}
::: {.innovation-grid}

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="../images/cloud_gis_course.png" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Cloud GIS & Open Source](cloud-gis.qmd){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Analysis of moving from proprietary cloud platforms to Python and R ecosystems.
:::
:::

:::
:::

<br>

## 📚 Essential Learning (External)
Curated external resources for mastering GIS, ML, and Remote Sensing.

::: {.innovation-section}
::: {.innovation-grid}

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/2c3e50/ffffff?text=EEFA+Book" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Cloud-Based RS with GEE](https://www.eefabook.org/){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
The fundamental book for learning Google Earth Engine (EEFA Book).
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/27ae60/ffffff?text=AutoGIS+L1" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[1. Intro to GIS in Python](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/lessons/L1/overview.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Geometric objects and GeoPandas fundamentals.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/1a5f7a/ffffff?text=AutoGIS+L2" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[2. CRS and Spatial Joins](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/lessons/L2/overview.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Managing projections and spatial data integration.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/e67e22/ffffff?text=AutoGIS+L3" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[3. Geocoding & Queries](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/lessons/L3/overview.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Spatial queries and address-to-coordinate conversion.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/d35400/ffffff?text=AutoGIS+L4" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[4. Reclassification](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/lessons/L4/overview.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Attribute reclassification and overlay analysis.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/2980b9/ffffff?text=AutoGIS+L5" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[5. Network Analysis](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/lessons/L5/overview.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Shortest path algorithms and service areas.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/2c3e50/ffffff?text=AutoGIS+L6" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[6. Data Visualization](https://autogis-site.readthedocs.io/en/latest/lessons/L6/overview.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Professional mapping and interactive web maps.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/34495e/ffffff?text=Fast.ai+L1" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Fast.ai L1: Getting Started](https://course.fast.ai/Lessons/lesson1.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Neural networks and training your first model.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/16a085/ffffff?text=Fast.ai+L2" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Fast.ai L2: Deployment](https://course.fast.ai/Lessons/lesson2.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Moving models from Jupyter to production apps.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/8e44ad/ffffff?text=Fast.ai+L3" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Fast.ai L3: Image Models](https://course.fast.ai/Lessons/lesson3.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Choosing and fine-tuning computer vision models.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/2c3e50/ffffff?text=Fast.ai+L4" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Fast.ai L4: NLP](https://course.fast.ai/Lessons/lesson4.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Natural Language Processing and Sentiment Analysis.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/2980b9/ffffff?text=Fast.ai+L5" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Fast.ai L5: From Scratch](https://course.fast.ai/Lessons/lesson5.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Building neural networks from basic linear algebra.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/27ae60/ffffff?text=Fast.ai+L6" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Fast.ai L6: Random Forests](https://course.fast.ai/Lessons/lesson6.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Tabular data and high-performance decision trees.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/d35400/ffffff?text=Fast.ai+L7" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Fast.ai L7: Collab Filtering](https://course.fast.ai/Lessons/lesson7.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
Recommendation systems and embedding layers.
:::
:::

::: {.innovation-card}
<img src="https://placehold.co/800x450/c0392b/ffffff?text=Fast.ai+L8" class="nolightbox">
::: {.innovation-card-label}
[Fast.ai L8: Convolutions](https://course.fast.ai/Lessons/lesson8.html){.stretched-link}
:::
::: {.innovation-card-desc}
CNN foundations and high-level vision architectures.
:::
:::

:::
:::

<br>

## 💡 Additional Material

For further technical documentation, visit the [Courses](../courses.qmd) section or explore the [Blog](../blog.qmd) for the latest research updates.
